name: Thai Yam Yai Siamese Princess Salad"i Love Thai Food
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, add the chicken breasts, pork, shrimp, and sausages. Bring to a boil.
2. Cook for about 20 minutes or until the pork is thoroughly cooked. Drain the water and set aside.
3. Place all dressing ingredients in a food processor or blender. Blend until smooth.
4. In a salad bowl, layer the cooked meats over salad greens.
5. Drizzle with the prepared dressing.
